form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of eight months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation by 0.5 len this track Daintree 4yo Hcp August 23 over 1500m defeating Obligated with 54.5kg at $2.80. When resuming last campaign fifth of 8 at this track Mdn May 15 over 950m, soft track; 5.5 len behind The Kamikaze carrying 60kg at $6.50. Can run a bold race.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd of 8 at this track Cl3-Sw on March 26 over 1250m, on a wet track; 0.7 len behind Colours Of Autumn carrying 57kg at $14. Before that 3rd of 11 at Townsville Bm60 on March 5 over 1400m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind March Madness carrying 59.5kg at $21. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by 1.75 len at this track Bm55 March 12 over 1250m in the wet defeating Grey Power with 59.5kg at $1.65. The run before that favourite; came from midfield and won by a neck at this track Cl1 February 16 over 1250m on a heavy track defeating Rhegion with 56kg at $2.35. Can be in the finish again.
